Interface IPolynomialXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a polynomial transform.

[Guid("B8A34DB7-E73B-4A09-8815-A7B729E33504")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPolynomialXform : IGeodataXform

Order

The polynomial order (0-3).
